title: Full Holy Grail Layout
description: Build the Holy Grail layout (header, nav, main, aside, footer) using Flexbox. Full viewport height, nav+aside fixed width, main flexible.
hint: Use column-direction flex for page, row-direction flex for middle section.

title: Responsive Card Grid
description: Create a responsive card grid with 8 cards that auto-wrap from 4 columns → 2 columns → 1 column.

solution.css:
.grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px; }
.card { flex: 1 1 250px; }
